news.title:
Nifty 50 fell nearly 1%, Sensex dropped 1.22%, snapping a 5-day rally on April 9 amid rising oil prices.
Ola Electric surged 20%, HFCL gained 5.9% with ₹1,366 cr orders; ITI, Meesho, and Ather Energy also advanced.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 fell nearly 1%, Sensex dropped 1.22%, snapping a 5-day rally on April 9 amid rising oil prices.
Ola Electric surged 20%, HFCL gained 5.9% with ₹1,366 cr orders; ITI, Meesho, and Ather Energy also advanced.

news.title:
HFCL Ltd.'s subsidiary, HTL Ltd., won a Rs 1,366 crore order for optical fiber cables, boosting revenue prospects.
The order highlights HFCL's competitive edge amid rising 5G demand but faces challenges like raw material costs and competition.
news.summary:
HFCL Ltd.'s subsidiary, HTL Ltd., won a Rs 1,366 crore order for optical fiber cables, boosting revenue prospects.
The order highlights HFCL's competitive edge amid rising 5G demand but faces challenges like raw material costs and competition.

news.title:
HFCL schedules EGM on Apr 24, 2026, via video conferencing.
Proposing 7.5 cr warrants at ₹74 each, totaling ₹555 cr, for promoters.
news.summary:
HFCL schedules EGM on Apr 24, 2026, via video conferencing.
Proposing 7.5 cr warrants at ₹74 each, totaling ₹555 cr, for promoters.

news.title:
HFCL plans Rs 800-900 cr investment for new plants, boosting capacity.
Expansion driven by data centre demand from global hyperscalers in India.
news.summary:
HFCL plans Rs 800-900 cr investment for new plants, boosting capacity.
Expansion driven by data centre demand from global hyperscalers in India.

news.title:
HFCL issued Rs.30 crore corporate guarantee for HTL's loan from Axis Finance.
HFCL owns 74% in HTL; guarantee to be recorded as contingent liability.
news.summary:
HFCL issued Rs.30 crore corporate guarantee for HTL's loan from Axis Finance.
HFCL owns 74% in HTL; guarantee to be recorded as contingent liability.

news.title:
HFCL Ltd to host plant visits for institutional investors on April 6-7, 2026.
Visits at Hyderabad and Hosur facilities will include business updates, industry discussions.
news.summary:
HFCL Ltd to host plant visits for institutional investors on April 6-7, 2026.
Visits at Hyderabad and Hosur facilities will include business updates, industry discussions.

news.title:
HFCL invests ₹580 Cr in an optical fiber plant to enhance margins by 6%.
HFCL secures a ₹1 billion order, strengthening its business outlook.
news.summary:
HFCL invests ₹580 Cr in an optical fiber plant to enhance margins by 6%.
HFCL secures a ₹1 billion order, strengthening its business outlook.

news.title:
HFCL board approves fund raising of Rs 555 cr via 7.5 cr warrants.
Warrants convertible to equity shares priced at Rs 74 per share.
news.summary:
HFCL board approves fund raising of Rs 555 cr via 7.5 cr warrants.
Warrants convertible to equity shares priced at Rs 74 per share.

news.title:
HFCL plans to expand and consolidate its defence, aeronautics, and aerostructure operations.
The move aims to strengthen HFCL's focus and execution in these sectors.
news.summary:
HFCL plans to expand and consolidate its defence, aeronautics, and aerostructure operations.
The move aims to strengthen HFCL's focus and execution in these sectors.

news.title:
HFCL to grow defence business via HFCL Advance Systems (HASPL), investing INR 175 crore.
HASPL acquisitions include Spiral (INR 25 crore), Raddef (INR 75 crore), Thermal Weapon Sight (INR 50 crore).
news.summary:
HFCL to grow defence business via HFCL Advance Systems (HASPL), investing INR 175 crore.
HASPL acquisitions include Spiral (INR 25 crore), Raddef (INR 75 crore), Thermal Weapon Sight (INR 50 crore).

news.title:
HFCL's board approved a 580 Cr preform manufacturing facility via HTPL.
Facility targets optical fiber demand, operational by July 2029 to reduce supply risks.
news.summary:
HFCL's board approved a 580 Cr preform manufacturing facility via HTPL.
Facility targets optical fiber demand, operational by July 2029 to reduce supply risks.

news.title:
HFCL Ltd's board to meet on March 25, 2026, to consider issuing convertible warrants on a preferential basis to promoters.
Trading window for designated persons will be closed from March 21-30, 2026, per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
HFCL Ltd's board to meet on March 25, 2026, to consider issuing convertible warrants on a preferential basis to promoters.
Trading window for designated persons will be closed from March 21-30, 2026, per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
HFCL signs Rs 10,160 crore 5-year optical fiber cable supply deal.
Balaji Amines faces ammonia issues; Raymond Realty gets IT notice; Vascon wins Rs 115.9 crore Lotus Park project.
news.summary:
HFCL signs Rs 10,160 crore 5-year optical fiber cable supply deal.
Balaji Amines faces ammonia issues; Raymond Realty gets IT notice; Vascon wins Rs 115.9 crore Lotus Park project.

news.title:
HFCL Ltd signs 5-year agreement to supply optical fiber cables worth $1.1B via overseas subsidiary.
Contract is valid through December 2030 with a global multinational corporation.
news.summary:
HFCL Ltd signs 5-year agreement to supply optical fiber cables worth $1.1B via overseas subsidiary.
Contract is valid through December 2030 with a global multinational corporation.

news.title:
HFCL bags a 5-year USD 1.1 billion contract from a global major.
The contract's potential value is Rs 10,159 crore based on OFC product prices.
news.summary:
HFCL bags a 5-year USD 1.1 billion contract from a global major.
The contract's potential value is Rs 10,159 crore based on OFC product prices.

news.title:
BPCL faces a ₹1,816.65 crore excise demand; plans to appeal to CESTAT. Chalet Hotels to invest ₹632.8 crore for a luxury hotel in Hyderabad by FY2029.
Lupin gets EU approval for its biosimilar Ranluspec. Concor, HFCL, NBCC, and Waaree Energies announce key projects across logistics, telecom, construction, and solar sectors.
news.summary:
BPCL faces a ₹1,816.65 crore excise demand; plans to appeal to CESTAT. Chalet Hotels to invest ₹632.8 crore for a luxury hotel in Hyderabad by FY2029.
Lupin gets EU approval for its biosimilar Ranluspec. Concor, HFCL, NBCC, and Waaree Energies announce key projects across logistics, telecom, construction, and solar sectors.

news.title:
HFCL joins IIT Delhi consortium for hollow core fiber tech, aiding 6G, quantum networks, ultra-low latency.
Hollow core fiber cuts latency and energy use; HFCL offers manufacturing and validation support.
news.summary:
HFCL joins IIT Delhi consortium for hollow core fiber tech, aiding 6G, quantum networks, ultra-low latency.
Hollow core fiber cuts latency and energy use; HFCL offers manufacturing and validation support.

news.title:
HFCL issued Rs. 50 Cr corporate guarantees for HTL's loans.
HTL, 74%-owned by HFCL, produces optical fiber cables.
news.summary:
HFCL issued Rs. 50 Cr corporate guarantees for HTL's loans.
HTL, 74%-owned by HFCL, produces optical fiber cables.

news.title: HFCL secures a significant order worth ₹605.9M, enhancing its market position.
news.summary: HFCL secures a significant order worth ₹605.9M, enhancing its market position.

news.title:
HFCL Ltd secured a USD 4.67M export order for optical fiber cables.
The order is to be executed by May 2026 for an international client.
news.summary:
HFCL Ltd secured a USD 4.67M export order for optical fiber cables.
The order is to be executed by May 2026 for an international client.
